title: Bath Bot
description: Bath Bot offers the ultimate sensory bathing experience at home. It pairs an explosion of colour with a wireless 360° sound experience to accompany every bath.

images.alt: Bath Bot. Two slick, bath bomb-shaped speaker gadgets with a flat base and modern design. One is fully white and the other is black and white. There is an embossed power button visible and the word "LUSH".

A round, white bath bomb-shaped waterproof speaker with glowing blue and rainbow lights sits on the edge of a white tiled bathtub filled with swirling bathwater. A hand rests on the tub nearby, next to a yellow striped towel.

A model in a bathtub holds a black, spherical, bath bomb-shaped waterproof speaker that glows with pink and purple light. The device is partially submerged in the clear bathwater, with ripples expanding around the person's hands.

A person relaxes in a white bathtub filled with swirling purple water and white foam. A white bath bomb-shaped waterproof speaker with a red and blue glow floats in the centre. Lush candles and skin care sit on a wooden stand in the background.
